message:
refactor(pt-core): fix remaining clippy warnings (bd-2u64)

Suppress needless_range_loop in mathematical code (IMM filter, HSMM,
belief state, calibration curve, goal optimizer) where index-based
loops are clearer. Convert beta_stacy at_risk loops to iterators.
Change &PathBuf to &Path in snapshot_persist.

Workspace is now fully clippy-clean (0 warnings).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
